message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[0, 50, 50, 0]","[{\"name\": \"Usine A\", \"cost_per_kwh\": 5, \"p_min\": 10, \"ramping_curve\": [[1, 20], [2, 50]], \"t_on\": 1, \"t_off\": 2}, {\"name\": \"Usine B\", \"cost_per_kwh\": 10, \"p_min\": 0, \"ramping_curve\": [[1, 60]], \"t_on\": 2, \"t_off\": 1}]","[[false, false], [true, true], [true, false], [false, false]]"],"focus":"t_on_violation_and_zero_demand_step"},{"input_lines":["[60, 130, 130, 80]","[{\"name\": \"Slow\", \"cost_per_kwh\": 5, \"p_min\": 20, \"ramping_curve\": [[1, 40], [2, 80], [3, 120], [4, 140]], \"t_on\": 3, \"t_off\": 1}, {\"name\": \"Fast\", \"cost_per_kwh\": 8, \"p_min\": 0, \"ramping_curve\": [[1, 100]], \"t_on\": 1, \"t_off\": 1}, {\"name\": \"Expensive\", \"cost_per_kwh\": 20, \"p_min\": 0, \"ramping_curve\": [[1, 200]], \"t_on\": 1, \"t_off\": 1}]","[[true, true, false], [true, true, true], [true, true, false], [false, true, false]]"],"focus":"slow_ramp_progression_with_auxiliary_dispatch_and_t_on_boundary"},{"input_lines":["[75.5]","[{\"name\": \"Plant A\", \"cost_per_kwh\": 10, \"p_min\": 75.5, \"ramping_curve\": [[1, 75.5]], \"t_on\": 1, \"t_off\": 1}, {\"name\": \"Plant B\", \"cost_per_kwh\": 10, \"p_min\": 0, \"ramping_curve\": [[1, 100]], \"t_on\": 1, \"t_off\": 1}]","[[true, false]]"],"focus":"floating_point_demand_exact_match_pmin_equals_pmax_and_cost_tie"}]}
